extensionDescription.message: Export and import cookies, local & session storage, IndexedDB, with optional AES password protection. Chrome & Firefox.

restrictedPage.message: This page cannot be accessed (e.g. browser internal pages). Open a normal http(s) tab.

exportNothingSelected.message: Select at least one item to export.

importParseError.message: Invalid file. Use a JSON export from this extension.

importDone.message: Import finished. Reload the page if the site does not pick up changes.

importPartialFail.message: Some items could not be applied. Try reloading the tab.

originMismatchBody.message: Backup is for $1 but this tab is $2. Import may not work as expected.

confirmImportBody.message: Selected cookies, storage keys, and IndexedDB rows will be created or replaced for this site.

privacyNote.message: Exports contain sensitive site data. Store files safely.

idbBlobNote.message: Blobs are read in a second pass when possible; huge or opaque blobs may still be skipped.

emptyIndexedDB.message: No IndexedDB data for this origin.

reloadSuggestion.message: Tip: reload the page after import.

encryptedNeedPassword.message: This file is encrypted. Enter the password below.

encryptedFileHelp.message: PBKDF2 + AES-GCM (same settings as export). Wrong password will fail to decrypt.

decryptFailed.message: Could not decrypt. Check the password.

profilesEmpty.message: No saved profiles for this site yet.

profilesEmptyHint.message: Save the current site credentials as a profile to quickly restore them later.

profileRestored.message: Profile restored. Reload the page if the site does not pick up changes.

profileRestorePartialFail.message: Some items could not be restored. Try reloading the tab.

profileConfirmDeleteBody.message: This will permanently delete the saved profile "$1".

profileConfirmRestoreBody.message: Cookies, storage keys, and IndexedDB data from this profile will be applied to the current tab.

profileNameRequired.message: Enter a name for this profile.

profileConfirmTrashBody.message: Move "$1" to trash? You can restore it later.

trashDeleteForeverBody.message: Permanently delete "$1"? This cannot be undone.

passwordStrengthWeak.message: Weak password — use at least 8 characters.

passwordStrengthFair.message: Fair password — add numbers or symbols for better security.

uiModeSwitchedSidebar.message: Sidebar mode enabled. Click the toolbar icon to open the side panel.

uiModeSwitchedPopup.message: Popup mode enabled. Click the toolbar icon to open the popup.
